parameters.description: Make HTTP requests to any URL. Input: a JSON object with 'url' (required), 'method' (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE, default GET), 'headers' (object, optional), 'body' (string or object, optional).
Search the web for information. Input: a search query string.

Calls a tool on an MCP server. Use when an installed MCP skill can help with the task. Required parameters: mcp_url (server URL), tool_name (tool to call), arguments (JSON object). Check available MCP servers in the system prompt.

Read a webpage and return its content as clean markdown. Input: URL string or JSON with url field. Use this instead of HTTP Tool when you need to read webpage content (articles, docs, blog posts). Returns clean text without HTML boilerplate.
